channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16447] conf-sanity test_50f: process isn't sleep
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for eaujames <eaujames@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/7650be98-4ea7-4149-8c10-f75e0bcb08f6

test_50f failed with the following error:

process isn't sleep

lctl dl | grep ' ST ' || true
CMD: trevis-70vm4 lctl get_param -n at_min
CMD: trevis-70vm4 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config 		TESTLOG_PREFIX=/autotest/autotest-1/2023-01-04/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_91460_5_0b85cb6e-8966-476f-afb0-e851b230b354//conf-sanity TESTNAME=test_50f 		bash rpc.sh wait_import_state DISCONN os[cp].lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0000.ost_server_uuid 40 
trevis-70vm4: trevis-70vm4.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing wait_import_state DISCONN os[cp].lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0000.ost_server_uuid 40
trevis-70vm4: os[cp].lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0000.ost_server_uuid in DISCONN state after 0 sec
CMD: trevis-70vm5 lctl get_param -n at_min
CMD: trevis-70vm5 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config 		TESTLOG_PREFIX=/autotest/autotest-1/2023-01-04/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_91460_5_0b85cb6e-8966-476f-afb0-e851b230b354//conf-sanity TESTNAME=test_50f 		bash rpc.sh wait_import_state DISCONN os[cp].lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0001.ost_server_uuid 40 
trevis-70vm5: trevis-70vm5.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing wait_import_state DISCONN os[cp].lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0001.ost_server_uuid 40
trevis-70vm5: os[cp].lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0001.ost_server_uuid in DISCONN state after 0 sec
CMD: trevis-70vm4 lctl get_param -n at_min
CMD: trevis-70vm4 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config 		TESTLOG_PREFIX=/autotest/autotest-1/2023-01-04/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_91460_5_0b85cb6e-8966-476f-afb0-e851b230b354//conf-sanity TESTNAME=test_50f 		bash rpc.sh wait_import_state DISCONN os[cp].lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0002.ost_server_uuid 40 
trevis-70vm4: trevis-70vm4.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing wait_import_state DISCONN os[cp].lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0002.ost_server_uuid 40
trevis-70vm4: os[cp].lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0002.ost_server_uuid in DISCONN state after 0 sec
CMD: trevis-70vm5 lctl get_param -n at_min
CMD: trevis-70vm5 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config 		TESTLOG_PREFIX=/autotest/autotest-1/2023-01-04/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_91460_5_0b85cb6e-8966-476f-afb0-e851b230b354//conf-sanity TESTNAME=test_50f 		bash rpc.sh wait_import_state DISCONN os[cp].lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0003.ost_server_uuid 40 
trevis-70vm5: trevis-70vm5.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing wait_import_state DISCONN os[cp].lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0003.ost_server_uuid 40
trevis-70vm5: os[cp].lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0003.ost_server_uuid in DISCONN state after 0 sec
mount lustre  on /mnt/lustre.....
Starting client: trevis-70vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com:  -o user_xattr,flock trevis-70vm4@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
CMD: trevis-70vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com mkdir -p /mnt/lustre
CMD: trevis-70vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,flock trevis-70vm4@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
llite.lustre-ffff925d83955000.lazystatfs=0
multiop /mnt/lustre v_f
TMPPIPE=/tmp/multiop_open_wait_pipe.20388
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/conf-sanity.sh: line 4282: kill: (558589) - No such process
 conf-sanity test_50f: @@@@@@ FAIL: process isn't sleep

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
conf-sanity test_50f - process isn't sleep

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
